title: Brahma Upanishad: The Supreme
description: From the Brahma Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Brahma Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: Brahman is to be known as the eternal abode of all. Brahman is the supreme light, supreme bliss, supreme peace. He is the eternal one. He is the goal of all the Upanishads. By knowing him, one is freed from all sorrow.
